mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_qna ( member_id, product_id, writer, title, content, answer_status ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{productId}, #{writer}, #{title}, #{content}, #{answerStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT q.id, q.member_id AS memberId, q.product_id AS productId, q.writer, q.title, q.content, q.answer_status AS answerStatus, q.answer_content AS answerContent, q.answered_at AS answeredAt, q.created_at AS createdAt FROM product_qna q ORDER BY q.id DESC

SELECT q.id, q.member_id AS memberId, q.product_id AS productId, q.writer, q.title, q.content, q.answer_status AS answerStatus, q.answer_content AS answerContent, q.answered_at AS answeredAt, q.created_at AS createdAt FROM product_qna q WHERE q.id = #{id}

SELECT q.id, q.member_id AS memberId, q.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, q.writer, q.title, q.content, q.answer_status AS answerStatus, q.created_at AS createdAt FROM product_qna q LEFT JOIN product p ON q.product_id = p.id WHERE q.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY q.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE product_qna SET answer_content = #{answerContent}, answer_status = '답변완료', answered_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
